narms_now_pct_resistant.long_name: Percentage of isolates resistant to a specific antimicrobial agent
narms_now_pct_resistant.short_description: Percentage of tested human clinical isolates showing resistance to a specific antimicrobial agent or matching a specific resistance pattern
narms_now_pct_resistant.long_description: Percentage of human clinical isolates tested by NARMS showing resistance to a specific antimicrobial agent or matching a specific resistance pattern, as determined by AST (antimicrobial susceptibility testing) or WGS (whole genome sequencing). Resistance is based on CLSI breakpoints. Data extracted from the NARMS Now interactive dashboard. Missing values: NA indicates the agent was on the testing panel but marked 'Not Tested' for that organism/year (e.g., an agent discontinued mid-series). A value of 0 with n_tested=0 indicates the agent was on the panel but no isolates were available. If an agent is not part of a genus's testing panel at all, no row exists in the data (different genera have different antimicrobial panels).
narms_now_pct_resistant.statement: In {location}, {value}% of {species} isolates were resistant to {agent}

narms_now_n_resistant.long_name: Number of isolates resistant to a specific antimicrobial agent
narms_now_n_resistant.short_description: Count of human clinical isolates showing resistance to a specific antimicrobial
narms_now_n_resistant.long_description: Number of human clinical isolates tested by NARMS showing resistance to a specific antimicrobial agent. Numerator of the resistance percentage. NA when the dashboard reports 'Not Tested' for that organism/year/agent combination. Zero when the agent was on the panel but no isolates were available. No row present when the agent is not part of that genus's testing panel.
narms_now_n_resistant.statement: In {location}, {value} isolates of {species} were resistant to {agent}

narms_now_n_tested.long_name: Number of isolates tested for antimicrobial susceptibility
narms_now_n_tested.short_description: Total number of human clinical isolates tested for resistance to a specific antimicrobial
narms_now_n_tested.long_description: Total number of human clinical isolates tested by NARMS for susceptibility to a specific antimicrobial agent. Denominator of the resistance percentage. NA when the dashboard reports 'Not Tested' for that organism/year/agent combination. Zero when the agent was on the panel but no isolates were available. No row present when the agent is not part of that genus's testing panel.
narms_now_n_tested.statement: In {location}, {value} isolates of {species} were tested for {agent}

narms_retail_pct_resistant.long_name: Percentage of retail meat isolates resistant to a specific antimicrobial agent
narms_retail_pct_resistant.short_description: Percentage of retail meat isolates testing resistant (R) to a specific antimicrobial agent, among positive cultures
narms_retail_pct_resistant.long_description: Percentage of retail meat isolates with a Resistant (R) call for a specific antimicrobial agent, calculated from individual isolate-level FDA NARMS retail meats data. Only isolates with GROWTH=YES (positive cultures) are included. Resistance is determined by CLSI breakpoints. Data are aggregated nationally by year, organism genus/species/serotype, meat source, and antibiotic. NA values indicate no isolates were tested for that combination.
narms_retail_pct_resistant.statement: In {location}, {value}% of {genus} isolates from {meat_source} were resistant to {antimicrobial}

citations.title: FDA NARMS Retail Meats Integrated Report

narms_retail_n_resistant.long_name: Number of retail meat isolates resistant to a specific antimicrobial agent
narms_retail_n_resistant.short_description: Count of retail meat isolates with a Resistant (R) call for a specific antimicrobial
narms_retail_n_resistant.long_description: Number of retail meat isolates classified as Resistant (R) by CLSI breakpoints for a specific antimicrobial agent. Numerator of the resistance percentage. Only positive cultures (GROWTH=YES) are included.
narms_retail_n_resistant.statement: In {location}, {value} {genus} isolates from {meat_source} were resistant to {antimicrobial}

narms_retail_n_tested.long_name: Number of retail meat isolates tested for antimicrobial susceptibility
narms_retail_n_tested.short_description: Total number of retail meat isolates tested for resistance to a specific antimicrobial
narms_retail_n_tested.long_description: Total number of retail meat isolates (GROWTH=YES) with a non-missing SIR call for a specific antimicrobial agent. Denominator of the resistance percentage.
narms_retail_n_tested.statement: In {location}, {value} {genus} isolates from {meat_source} were tested for {antimicrobial}

narms_retail_meats.name: FDA NARMS Retail Meats Surveillance Data
narms_retail_meats.organization: U.S. Food and Drug Administration, Center for Veterinary Medicine
narms_retail_meats.description: Isolate-level antimicrobial susceptibility data from the FDA NARMS retail meats program. Samples collected from retail stores in participating states. Organisms tested include Campylobacter (coli, jejuni), Enterococcus (faecalis, faecium), Escherichia coli, and Salmonella (multiple serotypes). Meat sources include retail chicken, ground beef, ground turkey, pork chops, and veal. SIR (Susceptible/Intermediate/Resistant) calls based on CLSI breakpoints. Data span 2002-2021.
narms_retail_meats.restrictions: Public domain. FDA data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

narms_now.name: NARMS Now: Human Data - Antimicrobial Resistance
narms_now.location: NARMS Now Interactive Dashboard - Human Data
narms_now.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
narms_now.description: Detailed antimicrobial resistance data from NARMS human clinical isolates, including resistance by individual antimicrobial agent (with CLSI class) and by resistance pattern (multidrug resistance profiles). Data available for 30 species/serotypes across 5 genera (Campylobacter, E. coli O157, Non-cholera Vibrio, Salmonella, Shigella). Both AST (phenotypic) and WGS (genotypic) test method results are available. Data extracted from the NARMS Now Power BI dashboard. Suggested citation: CDC. National Antimicrobial Resistance Monitoring System (NARMS) Now: Human Data. Atlanta, Georgia: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.
narms_now.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
